sql_fixture.redacted_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM claims LEFT JOIN evidence_items ON evidence_items.tenant_id = claims.tenant_id AND evidence_items.project_id = claims.project_id AND evidence_items.claim_id = claims.id WHERE claims.tenant_id = :target_tenant_id AND claims.project_id = :target_project_id AND claims.research_task_id = :current_research_task_id

assertions.name: metric_source_requires_reachable_research_task
assertions.expected: Citation coverage source queries must first prove the research_task_id is reachable in the current tenant/project context.

assertions.name: cross_tenant_task_id_is_rejected_before_aggregation
assertions.expected: A research_task_id from another tenant must not enter claim or evidence_item aggregation denominators.

assertions.name: sprint11_aggregator_consumes_block_signal
assertions.expected: Sprint 11 BL-0158 can treat this fixture as a public regression skeleton for AC-HARD-03 aggregation.

metadata.notes: Sprint 10 BL-0029c full integration。Research/Evidence schema 系の cross-tenant negative skeleton fixture。No production row IDs or personal data.
